pi_items.source: DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database: setup_task.sh queries organisationunit by UID 'DiszpKrYNg8' and retrieves org_unit_id 559. Evidence docs confirm org_unit_id 559 matches. Web search: Ngelehun is confirmed as a real village in Sierra Leone with documented health facilities.

setup_task.sh line 41 uses UID 'DiszpKrYNg8' to query the organisationunit table. Web search confirmed UIDs follow DHIS2 standard 8-character format. Evidence result shows org_unit_id 559 corresponding to this UID.

setup_task.sh lines 49-68 query for period with startdate '2023-10-01' and enddate '2023-10-31', confirming 202310 is the correct YYYYMM code. Web search confirmed DHIS2 uses YYYYMM format for monthly periods. Evidence docs show period_id 1499454 corresponds to this period.
DHIS2 standard period naming convention: 202310 (202 3 = year 2023, 10 = month October) = October 2023. Confirmed in setup_task.sh comments on line 49.

Task metadata in task.json line 21. Requirement for task completion verified in verifier.py lines 84-91 which checks for minimum_data_values (line 54). Five data values is a reasonable requirement for facility health indicators (e.g., ANC visits, deliveries, vaccinations).

Task description in README.md and task.json accurately describe DHIS2 data entry module and validation analysis features. Web search confirmed DHIS2 includes both aggregate data entry and validation rule checking as core functions for facility-level health information system reporting.

pi_items.verified_value: DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database (official, real-world reference data)
pi_items.source: setup_dhis2.sh lines 14-15 show database downloaded from official DHIS2 sources: https://databases.dhis2.org/sierra-leone/2.40/dhis2-db-sierra-leone.sql.gz. Web search confirmed these are official DHIS2 demo databases containing real-world reference data from Sierra Leone's health system, not synthetic or fabricated data.

pi_items.verified_value: Bo District is a real district in Sierra Leone's Southern Province
pi_items.source: Task description in README.md states facility is in Bo District. Web search confirms Bo District exists in Sierra Leone (second most populous district, capital is Bo town in Southern Province). Ngelehun is documented as a village in the region.

pi_items.verified_value: Approximately 5,000-6,000 people (specific data varies by source year)
pi_items.source: Task description README.md line 59 states ~5,000 catchment population for Ngelehun facility. Web search found UNICEF documentation referencing Ngelehun Community Health Post serving 'more than 5,800 people' with 279 deliveries in 22 months (2015-2016), which is consistent with the stated population and plausibility of data entry requirements.

privileged_info_summary: Ngelehun CHC (UID: DiszpKrYNg8) is a real Community Health Center in Sierra Leone, confirmed in the official DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database at organization unit ID 559. The facility serves approximately 5,000-5,800 people catchment population. The task targets October 2023 (period code 202310) for data entry. The DHIS2 demo database is official and maintained by the DHIS2 project, containing real-world health data from Sierra Leone's actual health system for demonstration and training purposes. The task requires entering at least 5 aggregate health data values (such as ANC visits, deliveries, or vaccinations) for this facility in the specified period, running validation analysis via DHIS2's built-in validation rules, and marking the dataset complete. The task tests core HMIS functionality used by health facility officers monthly across Sierra Leone's 1,332 health facilities.
